meal_prep_branch.description: Complete meal prep branch nodes for n8n. Insert Switch node after Webhook trigger, connect Output 0 to these nodes.

nodes.purpose: Validate meal prep payload, check deadline
Build valid JSON payload for Square API
Parse Square response for payment URL

nodes.node: MP - Send Payment Response to Frontend
nodes.purpose: Return payment link to customer browser
Send meal prep confirmation with payment link

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Meal Prep Order ' + $json.order_id + ' - Payment Required' }}
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{ $json.customer.name }},

Your meal prep order is ready!

Order {{ $json.order_id }}

  • Pickup: Thursday {{ $json.pickup_date }} at The Utopia Deli
  • Time: {{ $json.customer.pickup_time || 'Anytime 12:30-7:30 PM' }}

Meals Ordered:

{{ $json.items.map(i => ``).join('') }}
Meal Qty Price
${i.name}${i.qty}$${(i.qty * i.price / 100).toFixed(2)}
Labor & Packaging$50.00
Tax (6.5%)$${($json.pricing.tax / 100).toFixed(2)}
Total$${($json.pricing.total / 100).toFixed(2)}

Pay Now to Complete Order

Orders are non-refundable after Wednesday at 12:00 PM.
Questions? Call (501) 551-5944

nodes.purpose: Log meal prep order to database

parameters.query: INSERT INTO meal_prep_orders (order_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, items_json, subtotal_cents, labor_cents, tax_cents, total_cents, pickup_date, pickup_time, payment_link, square_order_id, status, source, notes, created_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.order_id }}', '{{ $json.customer.name }}', '{{ $json.customer.email }}', '{{ $json.phone_digits }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.items) }}', {{ $json.pricing.subtotal }}, {{ $json.pricing.labor }}, {{ $json.pricing.tax }}, {{ $json.pricing.total }}, '{{ $json.pickup_date }}', '{{ $json.customer.pickup_time }}', '{{ $json.payment_link }}', '{{ $json.square_order_id }}', 'pending_payment', 'meal-prep', '{{ $json.customer.notes }}', datetime('now'));

connections.to: MP - Send Payment Response to Frontend
